orderPins._source: plan §3.2 known tag-order defect: the two-column section rundown reads left column (Why, Sections 2-4) then right column (Sections 5-7, appendices); the engine interleaved Section 5 after Section 2. Source page image confirms the sections run 2→7 in order.
